/usr/bin/ar qc libgraphvis.a CMakeFiles/graphvis.dir/src/core/gvizThreadPool.c.o CMakeFiles/graphvis.dir/src/ds/gvizGraph.c.o CMakeFiles/graphvis.dir/src/ds/gvizTree.c.o CMakeFiles/graphvis.dir/src/ds/gvizArray.c.o CMakeFiles/graphvis.dir/src/ds/gvizDeque.c.o CMakeFiles/graphvis.dir/src/ds/gvizBitArray.c.o CMakeFiles/graphvis.dir/src/ds/gvizSubgraph.c.o CMakeFiles/graphvis.dir/src/ds/gvizQuadtree.c.o CMakeFiles/graphvis.dir/src/algorithms/search/gvizBreadthFirst.c.o CMakeFiles/graphvis.dir/src/algorithms/search/gvizDepthFirst.c.o CMakeFiles/graphvis.dir/src/algorithms/search/gvizConnectedComponents.c.o CMakeFiles/graphvis.dir/src/algorithms/search/gvizKNearest.c.o CMakeFiles/graphvis.dir/src/embedders/gvizEmbeddedGraph.c.o CMakeFiles/graphvis.dir/src/embedders/gvizEmbeddedTree.c.o CMakeFiles/graphvis.dir/src/embedders/gvizGRIPEmbedder.c.o CMakeFiles/graphvis.dir/src/embedders/gvizForceDirected.c.o CMakeFiles/graphvis.dir/src/embedders/gvizForceModel.c.o CMakeFiles/graphvis.dir/src/embedders/gvizForceEmbedder.c.o CMakeFiles/graphvis.dir/src/embedders/gvizPlanarEmbedder.c.o CMakeFiles/graphvis.dir/src/embedders/gvizSchnyderWood.c.o CMakeFiles/graphvis.dir/src/embedders/gvizTutteEmbedder.c.o CMakeFiles/graphvis.dir/src/embedders/gvizSpringTutteEmbedder.c.o CMakeFiles/graphvis.dir/src/utils/graphs.c.o CMakeFiles/graphvis.dir/src/utils/graphLoader.c.o CMakeFiles/graphvis.dir/src/utils/serializers.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libgraphvis.a
